chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-2202 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.8733/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA No.8734/2025 (Ex/A) 4. For hearing of main case 05.01.2026 Mr. Shahid Ali Memon, Advocate for petitioner ************** 1. Granted. 2. Deferred for the time being. 3. Granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 4. The record indicates that the disability certificate, annexed as Annexure "A" and available at page No.11, does not confirm to the requirements prescribed under the applicable law. Counsel for the petitioner submits that the petitioner has applied for a certificate in accordance with the provisions of the Sindh Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities Act, 2018, before the competent Board/Committee constituted in 2019 under the said Act. However, under instructions, counsel for the petitioner does not press the present Constitution Petition at this stage and proposes to file a fresh petition seeking appropriate relief upon receipt of a valid certificate from the competent authority. Accordingly, the instant Constitution Petition stands dismissed. The petitioner, however, is at liberty to file a fresh petition after obtaining the requisite certificate, if so advised. J U D G E J U D G E M.Ali*
